sections.content: Board reset. Let me check the blue/yellow object on the right side. Let me find its position and try clicking it.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the blue/yellow object
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['b', 'S', 'Y'] and n['pixels'] < 20:
        b = n['boundary']
        center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
        print(f"color={n['color']}, center={center}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
